memoryArtifacts.headline: Christian II von Oldenburg
memoryArtifacts.description:
Christian von Oldenburg, genannt der Kreuzfahrer (* 12. Jahrhundert; † 1192), war Sohn des Grafen Christian I. des Streitbaren von Oldenburg.
Er hat in den Stammbäumen des Oldenburger Grafenhauses kei …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian II VON OLDENBURG於1178年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格時，他的父親Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg33歲，母親Salome von Are-Hochstaden23歲。他去世於1233年6月11日在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 歐登伯格享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: VON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: OLDENBURG
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian II VON OLDENBURG was born in 1178, in Oldenburg, Germany, his father, Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg, was 33 and his mother, Salome von Are-Hochstaden, was 23. He died on 11 June 1233, in Oldenburg, Oldenburg, Germany, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian II VON OLDENBURG est né en 1178, à Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne, son père, Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Salome von Are-Hochstaden, avait 23 ans. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1233, à Amt Oldenburg, Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Christian II VON OLDENBURG(이)가 1178년 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Salome von Are-Hochstaden(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1233년 6월 11일 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그 아트 덴버그에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian II VON OLDENBURG родился в 1178 г. в местности фристаат олденбург, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Moritz I von Oldenburg было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Salome von Are-Hochstaden, 23. Он умер 11 июня 1233 г. в местности амт олденбург, фристаат олденбург, Германия в возрасте 55 лет.
